review_text: fantastic view, quiet place to stay, very friendly and helpful owner. thank you!

We booked a 2 night stay here over the May BH weekend. The camp site is clean, well run and perfect for a family get away. Our 6 year old made lovely friends and played on the beach for hours. We’re just home and we’re all exhausted from the fresh air. I would highly recommend a stay here. Niall was a pleasure to deal with and we will most certainly be back.

We had a lovely stay with Niall in our campervan. We were told to pick oir spot. if you want the feel of wild camping but with all your essentials met, this is excellent. Niall gave us a local map and maked "off track drives" for us. Places we wouldn't have seen without his help. Definitely be back for a longer stay.

Spent 4 nights with our touring caravan. Nice site right next to the beach. Plenty of space for each pitch with own ehu & water. Toilet/shower block dated & wasn't inspected daily while we were there. Also it's situated in the static caravan section, which is a bit of a walk for some elderly folk. Service area needs attention.. Small metal dustbin with no dedicated recycling, apart from bottle banks which were overflowing & it was only the start of the season. Chemical Toilet is just that.. a Toilet just sitting there. Could do with some sort of fence around to disguise it. Grass was in desperate need of it's first cut of the year & would have made it near impossible to put up an awning. Saying all that, Niall the owner couldn't be more helpful, the site is so quiet & the area is lovely, with some really spectacular scenery.
Super Platz und sehr freundlicher Besitzer.

August 2025
Quite a nice campsite on the coast with extra fields for tents and vans. We were admitted even though we arrived quite late on our bikes. There is a kitchen. However, 28€ for two people in a small tent is too much.

Super camping en bord de mer (bon la pour le coup la météo n'y était pas 😂) équipements suffisants.
Sanitaires très propre 👌
Super accueil du patron .

Stayed in a motorhome..
the owner was great and responsive to request , beautiful pitches looking into the estuary.
Toilet blocks are a bit dated but suited our needs .

Had a lovely weekend here. Fantastic views, right beside the water.  Peaceful location. Large pitches with electric and fresh water tap right beside. Basketball courts, outdoor ping pong tables. Will definitely be back again. Would recommend

We stayed here last night , we arrived in the late evening and Niall was there to meet us . He was so nice and friendly, told us of all the places we should visit while in the area , he showed us to our pitch and told us to ring him anytime if we need anything, a genuine nice guy that looks after all the guests that come onto his site , the site itself is beautiful with stunning views all around, all the amenities that you would need when traveling around and spotless . We will definitely be back here again, so far it tops our list of best campsites in ireland

We enjoyed our 3 nights camping here. Niall was helpful on the phone when I booked and his daughter was lovely at check in. |Our tent pitch was large and overlooking the water. Electric hook up and tap beside us. It was very quiet and peaceful despite being busy. Everyone was friendly and it has a lovely vibe. |The kitchen was fine with 3 sinks for wash up and a kettle & microwave. The loos could definitely benefit from an upgrade and more showers are needed. There’s only one shower so very often there’s a queue. |They were kept clean and tidy though. |Kilkee is a short drive away but we preferred Carrigaholt with Carmody’s pub and coffee yard. Great place! |Kilrush is better for supermarkets if you need supplies. |Overall we had a great time and would definitely camp here again.

Very disappointed with the safety at this campsite. We spent 12 hrs in A&E with our kid as they fell off a ledge and into a large hole behind the table tennis area breaking her arm making it completely unsafe for kids.

Great location. Pods are well equiped (microwave, kettle and a small fridge). 1 double bed - 1 single bed and a fold out sofa which will sleep 2. Lots of space between each pod so you're not on top of your nrighbours. There's a picnic table with a BBQ stand (for a disposable BBQ) for each pod.
Lovrly walks around the site and great play areas for the kids.
There's a camp fire lit each night with timber provided so you can sit for the warmth or sit to have a glass (or 7) by the night light.
Over all very impressed, we'll be back again.

Lovely campsite with plenty of access to electricity, very reasonable prices right beside the water. Also has static mobile homes onsite. Resident restrooms,showers kitchen area and a laundry room within walking distance on light paths

Wir hatten Glück und bekamen zu später Stunde einer der beiden letzten Plätze für unseren Campervan. Der Standplatz schien neu und leider alles andere als eben und auch der Wasseranschluss hatte kein Wasser. Der Empfang war aufgrund eines Umbaus des Gebäudes etwas behelfsmässig.
Der Ausblick aufs Meer kompensiert jedoch so einiges.
Was camping here at the weekend. Niall could not be more helpful and accommodating. A nice campsite with everything the is required and we'll setup. Happy to recommend.
Mooie camperplaatsen met uitzicht op zee. Apart van vaste stacaravans. Vriendelijke eigenaar! Sanitair prima.

Careful : the rates on the website are not correct. The website information is 6 to 8€ for a cyclist or hiker and I was charged 15€ which is double (not sure if that's legal...). So expect to pay more as well. Also the shower is not included and you have to pay 1€ for 10 min. If you're lucky to have one. The facilities are old and not adapted. There were about 100 campers and only two showers (one per gender). I camped one night and left the next morning without being able to shower. Only one person seems to take care of the whole place so it's very difficult to get help when needed. I think the price they charge is not adapted to the quality of service. I should have gone wild camping. Plenty of good spots around for that (check park4night). The location by the ocean is nice. That's why I put two stars.
We had such a nice time camping at Green Acres. The bathrooms were clean, tidy & the person who greeted us was lovely. We were in a tent & had a beautiful view of the sea!! Highly recommend

A beautiful Atlantic Coast camp site run by Nial, the owner. Wonderful service and very friendly, Nial did everything to assist our stay over two nights was just perfect. Celebrating my 70’th birthday in a remote but idyllic spot with a lovely restaurant and three pubs in the coastal village of Carrigaholt.

Het contact via mail verliep wat moeilijk waardoor we opeens geen plek meer bleken te hebben. Maar net toen we op zoek gingen naar een andere camping, kregen we telefoon van de eigenaar die toch nog een plekje voor ons had gevonden. De camping is erg ruim, netjes en ligt op een toplocatie. De eigenaar is heel vriendelijk en hij geeft je graag info over alle plekken in de buurt die je zeker moet bezoeken. Ik keer met plezier nog eens terug!

Wonderful Caravan and camping site in on the Loop Head Pennisula. Site is very well maintained with all the necessary facilities. Right on the coast overlooking the Shannon Estuary.  Close to the village of Carrigaholt and a short drive to kilkee. Lots to see and do. Family run and managed... Niall is welcoming and helpful. I recommend a visit.
Top Betreiber, hat uns die Gegend super erklärt und haben super Sachen erkundet. Der Platz hat eine top Aussicht. Gerne wieder!!

We spent 1 week here . 2 adults and 3 children.  Location is perfect for exploring west Clare .
The sites for caravans and campervans are enormous !!   Huge!!! All overlooking the bay .
Paved and Perfectly level. Each site has its own individual water supply, which is a lovely bonus . Green areas are maintained to a very high standard.  Toilets and showers are pristine.  Plenty of picnic tables dotted around also .
Plenty of sheltered areas for pitching tents too.
The owner , Niall , is a gentlemen . Always on hand for assistance , information or a chat .
We've stayed in many places throughout the country and this one really sticks out as been of a very high standard .
Already looking forward to returning.
Camping le long de la mer, avec une belle vue. Bien même si les sanitaires sont peu nombreux et les emplacements pour tentes très éloignés.

Beautiful place for our touring caravan.
It's not a hotel it's a tent, touring caravan, campervan and permanent mobile home site overlooking the Shannon estuary on the County Clare  side of the mouth of the Shannon River near to Carrigaholt and Kilkee.

Super, schöner Campingplatz, hat uns sehr gut gefallen, unser Wohnmobil hatte einen Stellplatz mit tollem Blick auf die Shannon Mündung, besonderes Highlight war, dass jeder Stellplatz einen eigenen Wasseranschluss und eine eigene Holzbank Kombination mit Tisch.

Gute Ausgangslage für Loop Head, die Bridges of Ross und die Kilkee Cliffs.
Gerne jederzeit wieder.

Outstanding campground off the beaten track.
On the shores of the Shannon river and a gentle 6km walk to the nearest village for a couple of quiet pubs.
Awesome team that run the place....very helpful and friendly.
Clean utilities so thorougly recommend a night or two here.
Wunderschön gelegener Campingplatz. Sehr netter Besitzer.

We spent four days here, the owner Niall was great. We could pick any pitch, they all have great views. There is water and electricity at every pitch and the toilets etc were spotless. There is an amazing beach just next door. Would definitely come back again.

Prachtig uitzicht op het meer. Vriendelijke ontvangst door de dochter. Wc en douches zijn verouderd, douche is 1 euro voor een paar minuten. Maar er is maar 1 douche met een vies douchegordijn dat de douche veel te klein maakt.
Er is een wasmachine voor 1 euro voor 20 minuten en ook voor de droogkast 1 euro voor 20 minuten, maar de droogkast droogt niet en kan tot 2,5 uur duren voor alles droog is dus best duur.
De camping kost 31 euro per nacht met elektriciteit. De plaatsen voor de camper zijn verhard met gras naast. Er is ook alleen gras voor te tenten.
Er is dichtbij geen winkel of niets voor te eten, wel een dorp 6 km verderop makkelijk met de fiets te bereiken, waar vanalles is.

Very nice Campsite with separated pitches. Niall and his daughter were very friendly and helpful!

Most of the Campsite is for long-term campers, but there are also many pitches for short term camping.

The facilities were quite new and clean: much better than most other Campsites we visited in Ireland. One of the best Campsites we visited in Ireland.

Wir kamen mit dem Wohnmobil und fanden die gesamt Anlage sehr sympathisch und mit toller Lage:
Standplatz mit gepflasteter Parkfläche, große Grünfläche und eigener Tischgarnitur, elektrischer Anschluss, eigener Wasser- und Abwasseranschluss *****
gesamte Anlage, weitläufig, sehr schön und sehr gepflegt, direkt am Wasser*****
Freundlichkeit und Hilfsbereitschaft von Betreiber und dessen Tochter, einchecken auch zu später Uhrzeit *****
Ver- und Entsorgeeinrichtung, Entleerung Toilette, alles im Freien, sehr praktisch ****
Sanitäranlagen, ältere Anlage, sehr sauber, nur jeweils eine Dusche, 1 Euro Männer 6min, Frauen 10min, viel heißes Wasser ****
Küche ist geräumig und praktisch *****
Wir würden sofort wieder hier einchecken. Top! Danke an die Betreiberfamilie

Niall is a gentleman. He came out and booked us in just as Storm Ernesto hit Ireland. Great, tidy caravan park with brilliant facilities. We only stayed one night but will be checking in again for sure.
Spotless, Niall was helpful, with a great overview of local attractions/resturants etc.. Definitely will be back.
So muss ein Platz sein. Herzlich, wunderschön und seinen absolut fairen Preis einfach wert. Eine echte Empfehlung!

Highly recommend, there is an amazing view and well maintained campsite. We will be back again. Very friendly and helpful owner. Looking out over the sea. Very clean toilets and lovely atmosphere in general. Just sorry we weren't staying longer.

Sehr, sehr netter Empfang, hilfsbereit und ein top Platz zum nächtigen.

Ruhiger geht es nicht und stets mit Blick auf das Meer.

Klare Empfehlung!

Update: gesprek gehad met de eigenaar.  Blijkt dat hij middenin een verbouwing zit. De prachtige voorziening voor mindervaliden is momenteel bergplaats voor bouwmaterialen. Blijft over de afstand tussen kampeerterrein en sanitair. Wel opgehoogd naar 3 sterren voor de mooie lokatie.  Mooie camping met uitzicht over de rivier de Shannon. Toch maar 2 sterren omdat het sanitair absoluut ongeschikt is voor mindervaliden. Het ligt sowieso een eind weg van de kampeerplekken en is voor mensen die moeilijk lopen erg lastig te betreden. Jammer, want met een goed toegankelijk sanitairblok zou dit absoluut 5 sterren hebben gekregen.
Very friendly and helpful staff, well maintained facilities, will definitely be back again !

Wir wurden sehr freundlich und hilfsbereit vom Inhaber des Campingplatzes empfangen. Es handelt sich hier um ein sehr gepflegtes Gelände hauptsächlich für Standwohnwagen. Ein Teil ist abgetrennt für Wohnwagen, Wohnmobile und Zelte. Befestigte Stellplätze. Man hat einen sehr guten Ausblick auf das Meer. Das Servicehaus ist sauber, aber schon ein wenig in die Jahre gekommen. Die Be- und Entsorgung für Wohnmobile wirkt etwas provisorisch. Auf diesen Campingplatz kommen wir gerne wieder.
Lovely peaceful spot ,right on the estuary,huge variety of birds and met a hare on the way to the shower. Very clean and neat. Owner very helpful and friendly
Nice clean space with all services

A fantastic location on the Shannon estuary and wished we had booked for a longer stay.   Owner Niall is very helpful and advised on a great scenic drive which was fantastic.  Thanks so much for the stay.
Great location with a nice flat parking for the roof tent! Nice and friendly staff.

Die Lage ist sehr schön. Auch der Platz ist shr schön man viel Platz für Zelte und Wohnmobile. Der Camping ist aber auf die mobilen Häuser ausgelegt. Rezeption ist keine vorhanden per Zufall beim Einfahren den Chef getroffen der uns einwies und zum bezahlen am nächsten morgen mussten wir ihn anrufen. Einrichtungen wie Toilette und Duschen sehr alt und heruntergekommen.

Fantastic place to stay, lovely views, clean, lovely chilled out vibe can’t rate it highly enough. Can’t wait to go back. Niall lovely  host very helpful and friendly.we didn’t get the weather we hoping for but it didn’t matter really enjoyed it anyway.
Amazing view, beautiful beach, great spots to swim nearby!
More catered to camper vans than tent campers. Fantastic location for visiting the loop head peninsula. Don't miss swimming in the pollock holes at low tide.

Very good host and excellent sea side location. Good value at 26€ per night for a tent and 2 adults. Facilities good and clean. In the process of upgrading so it should be even better in the future. Recommended.
Vraiment pas sérieux, pas de réception et personne ne répond aux numéros de téléphone.
A pitty it was raining and windy during our stay. Service was great though.

A one night stay which I could have happy extended. Really lovely host who came across to give us a map and show us the best route around the Loop. He’s obviously doing more improvements to it but the toilets, shower block and kitchen were all immaculate.
Sehr schöner Ort saubere Sanitäranlagen und ein sehr freundlich und hilfsbereiter Besitzer. Einfach super
Good camping place. Very friendly people.

I’m enjoying the camping part of this place but the place itself, honestly really poor. The kitchen doesn’t have a lot in it even though there’s a kitchen mentioned on the website. There’s no pictures of a kitchen on the website either. We haven’t even met the owner yet. No cutlery either. I personally wouldn’t stay here again but you have your own opinion.
We always enjoy going to green acres!

Superb tent pitches right down by the beach. Clean facilities and spacious camp kitchen. Showers are coin operated (€1 for 10 minutes). The owner arrived at 10pm for payment but luckily we were still awake !
We have a good experience   thr is quiet,  clean

Great location for tent pitches next to the rocks with a berm wall to check the wind.
Clean facilities. Nice kitchen area.
Wonderful owner. I realised I  had dropped some keys somewhere,  I  called him and he dropped  what he was doing to go check. He found them and called me straight back.  Much appreciated!!
Have to drive for food or shopping, but that is a small price to pay to stay in such a nice and quiet area.

Fantastic family run campsite in the west of Clare. |The owner Niall was very welcoming informative about the area and gave us a map of loophead and took time to describe the map and tell us what fun stuff there was to do in the local area!||We stayed in a 2 bedroom mobile which was right in front of the sea with a beautiful deck overlooking the shannon estuary. There was a small green area right beside our mobile where the children could play and we could keep an eye on them and there was a bigger green area right behind the mobile.| |The beach which was just off the park was lovely when the tide was in and very child friendly. There was also another beach called Glosheen, a sandy cove which was only a 5 min drive. Kilkee is a 10 min drive and has shops, beaches, icecream shops, restraunts and the pollock holes which is worth a visit||The mobile itself was very clean and spacious as were the facilities for campers. It included pots, pans, cutlery, plates, cups, glasses, etc. a TV and cleaning supplies. ||If you have a pet it is best to mention it while booking and all dogs must be kept on a lead at all times. There are also no dogs allowed that are a cross-breed or on the 'dangerous dog list'. ||It was a lovely stay and a great way to start off the summer, wish we booked another few weeks, will definatley be back in the next few months!|Thanks Niall and family
